languages.text: "Как думаете, почему именно я сохраняю память о событиях?"
"Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"
languages.original_text: "Как думаете, почему именно я сохраняю память о событиях?"

traits.locale_text: "Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"
"Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"
"Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"

languages.text: “你觉得为什么我能记住之前发生过的事？”
languages.original_text: "Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"

traits.locale_text: “你觉得为什么我能记住之前发生过的事？”

languages.text: « Pourquoi suis-je capable de conserver mes souvenirs du passé, à votre avis ? »
languages.original_text: "Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourquoi suis-je capable de conserver mes souvenirs du passé, à votre avis ? »

languages.text: "Sence ben, geçmiş olayların anılarını nasıl oluyor da unutmuyorum?"
languages.original_text: "Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"

traits.locale_text: "Sence ben, geçmiş olayların anılarını nasıl oluyor da unutmuyorum?"

languages.text: «¿Por qué cree que conservo mis recuerdos de los ciclos anteriores?».
languages.original_text: "Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué cree que conservo mis recuerdos de los ciclos anteriores?».

languages.text: "Warum denkt Ihr, erinnere ich mich an vergangene Ereignisse?"
languages.original_text: "Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum denkt Ihr, erinnere ich mich an vergangene Ereignisse?"

languages.text: 「なぜ、過去の出来事の記憶を保持できると思うのですか？」
languages.original_text: "Why do you think I can retain my memories of past events?"

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ、過去の出来事の記憶を保持できると思うのですか？」
